thresholdOverrides.reason: A Svelte <template> counts every {#if}/{#each}/class:/ternary as a branch and carries its <style> block in the line count, and components have no unit coverage — so CRAP (cyclomatic^2 at 0% coverage) and unit size flag ordinary markup rather than real complexity. maxCyclomatic (20) and maxCognitive (15) still apply and remain the real guard.
